caption: A man with long dark hair and glasses stands at a microphone in a room with wood-paneled walls. He is wearing a traditional outfit consisting of a white shirt, a dark vest, and a red garment beneath the vest. He appears to be speaking or singing, gesturing slightly with his hands. In front of him, several people are seated, viewed from behind. The audience members include women with various hair colors, including blonde, brunette, and gray, some of whom are wearing dark purple or red clothing. A microphone stand is positioned in front of the man. The word "ORCA" appears as a white text logo on the right side of the scene. Across the frames, the man remains in position, continuing his address to the seated group with subtle movements of his head and hands.
